_description: Debug n8n workflow executions. Find what failed, which node, what error.

_list_recent_failures._description: Get last 10 failed executions for a workflow

_get_execution_detail._description: Full node-by-node output. Shows which node errored, the error message, and input/output data.

_debug_checklist: 1. n8n.sh executions --id WORKFLOW_ID --status error  (find the failed execution)
2. n8n.sh execution-detail --id EXECUTION_ID  (see which node broke)
3. Read the error message. Map to GTMOps payload gotchas.
4. Common: 422 = bad payload shape, 401 = expired token, 429 = rate limit, timeout = network issue

_common_errors.422 Unprocessable Entity: Payload shape is wrong. Check the matching GTMOps payload template.
_common_errors.401 Unauthorized: API key expired or wrong. Check .env.
_common_errors.403 Forbidden: Scope issue or Cloudflare block (Gamma). Check User-Agent.
_common_errors.429 Too Many Requests: Rate limit hit. Add wait nodes between API calls.
_common_errors.ECONNREFUSED: Target API is down or VPS is unreachable.
